title: erythroxylum obovatum
intro: Erythroxylum obovatum, also known as the Brazilian coca plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Erythroxylaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve nausea. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and providing antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Erythroxylum obovatum plant can be consumed as a tea or infused in water to make a medicinal tonic.
